name: preferences: Cmd-, opens the Settings window with expected controls
comment: Now drivable on the new AutoPilot: the key map includes ',' so Cmd-, opens Settings (was impossible before). The window title is 'Settings'. We assert it opens and a representative control from several sections is present (by exact title — these checkboxes have no AXIdentifier). NOTE: checkbox on/off STATE is not assertable — AutoPilot reads AXValue via string cast, but an NSButton checkbox's AXValue is a number, so `assert value` returns empty. So this asserts presence only; the pref defaults are covered headlessly by PreferencesTests.
